error.no_devices: No devices found on this account

user.title: Installation Mode
user.description: Choose the connection mode for your Flipr:

cloud_auth.title: Flipr Cloud Login
cloud_auth.description: Enter your Flipr credentials. The integration will automatically discover devices linked to your account.

local_bt.title: Flipr Local (Bluetooth)
local_bt.description: Select your Flipr device detected locally via Bluetooth:

select_device.title: Select Device
select_device.description: {nb_devices} device(s) found on your Flipr account. Select the one to monitor.

mix_ble_confirm.title: Bluetooth Detected!
mix_ble_confirm.description:
Your Flipr (S/N: {serial}) was automatically detected in local Bluetooth at address **{mac}**.

Choose how to proceed:

pool_details.title: Dimensions & Chemistry
pool_details.description: Enter pool dimensions (to calculate volume and treatment doses) and chemistry values if known.

manual_device.title: Manual Entry
manual_device.description: Enter your Flipr serial number (S/N) (and the MAC address if using local mode) manually.

manual_mac_choice.title: Bluetooth Not Detected
manual_mac_choice.description:
No Flipr was automatically detected in local Bluetooth.

Choose how to continue the setup:

manual_mac.title: Enter MAC Address
manual_mac.description: Enter your Flipr BLE MAC address below to force local connection.

init.title: Flipr Pool Configuration
init.description: Set pool dimensions, water chemistry and Bluetooth options.

ble_scan.title: Bluetooth Scan
ble_scan.description: {nb_ble} Flipr(s) detected within Bluetooth range. Select the device to connect.
